title: SAML Authentication Failed: Could not parse SAML response
symptom: When attempting to log in via SAML Single Sign-On with Okta, n8n returns an error stating 'Could not parse SAML response'. This prevents successful authentication.
applies_when: Using Okta for SAML Single Sign-On
not_this_if: Error occurs in a different authentication method
root_cause: The error indicates that the SAML response received from the identity provider (Okta) is not formatted correctly or is being altered during the redirect flow. This can happen due to misconfigured URLs or issues with the SAML response payload.
fix_steps: Open developer tools in your browser and enable 'preserve log'.
Attempt the SAML login process again and observe the network requests.
Check for any GET parameters or POST body payloads that may be malformed.
If a long string is present, decode it to inspect the SAML response.
agent_instruction: Use browser developer tools to analyze the SAML response during the login process.
